entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Ula dhaqan tan sidii jilid taariikhi ah oo leh caddayn, oo leh baasaboor, talo-bixin safar, aragtida adduunka, iyo doorashooyin.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
entries.value: Ula dhaqanka suuq caan ah sidii suuq soo jiidasho leh.

entries.source: Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Ula dhaqanka diinta sidii ra'yi gaar ah halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd nidaam dadweyne waxay u ekaan lahayd wax lala yaabo oo laga yaabo inay khatar tahay.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
entries.value: Ula dhaqanka koritaanka dakhliga sidii koritaanka qiimaha.

entries.source: Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Ula dhaqanka qaabka sidii beddelka sababaynta.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
entries.value: Wadahadalka maxkamaddu wuxuu dhex maraa goobaha madaniga ah

entries.source: Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: canshuurta qaxwaha waxay kordhisaa kharashka iibiyeyaasha. Maxaad filan kartaa ka hor intaadan arkin garaafka?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: qiimuhu wuxuu u diiwaangashan yahay mid aan la qeexin isla markiiba ka dib wicitaanka soo qaadista (fetch call). Waa maxay hubinta ugu horreysa ee ugu waxtarka badan?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: haddii iibku kordho 20% laakiin faa'iidada saafiga ah ay yaraato iyo baahida alaab-kaydku ay kor u kacdo, maxaa u badan inay ku dhacaan qulqulka lacagta caddaanka ah ee bilaashka ah?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: gaarsiinta cuntada, xooggee ayaa u badan inuu xoojiyo macaamiisha oo isbarbar dhigaya qiimaha barnaamijyada kala duwan?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: waa maxay caddaynta ka wanaagsan ee muujinaysa inaad fahantay fikrad cusub?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Isku day marka hore: weedhee ayaa badanaa u baahan dayactir marka caddayntu ay jirto laakiin cutubku uu weli u muuqdo mid aan lagu qancin?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Isku day qaabkan: "Marka ___ isbeddelo, ___ wuu isbeddelaa sababtoo ah ___."

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: U beddel agabka bandhig aad dhab ahaan naftaada ku tijaabiso.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: U beddel meesha daciifka ah su'aalo, kaararka xusuusta, ama sheekaysi daba-gal ah.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Fahan aasaaska, xalli dhibaatooyinka, dib u eegis degdeg ah...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Fahamku wuxuu ka dhigan yahay inaad saadaalin karto, sharxi karto, oo aad isticmaali karto fikrad xaalad cusub. Akhrisku waa bilowga oo keliya.
Tirada maxkamadda ee aan magaca lahayn waa isku-dhafan
Dadka deegaanka ee aan magaca lahayn waa isku-dhafan

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Aan la xallin ilaa inta laga cayimayo goobta taariikhiga ah.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Faahfaahinta aan la xaqiijin waa inay ahaadaan kuwo si muuqata u hubin la'aan
Isticmaal sheekaysiga si aad tan u hagaajiso

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
entries.value: Isticmaal oo keliya sida xalka ugu dambeeya.

entries.source: Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Isticmaal faylka si aad u aragto waxa dhiirigeliya, cabsida, xulafada, iyo cadowga qaabeeya jawaabta.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Isticmaal qaybaha muuqda: Waxyaabaha la wadaago, ka qaybqaadashada AI, dhaqdhaqaaqa isticmaalaha, faallooyinka dhex-galka ah, diiwaanka go'aanka, su'aalaha furan, tallaabada xigta.
Isticmaalaha ayaa go'aamiya waxa la soo saarayo
Isticmaalaha ayaa dejiyay ujeeddo la wadaago

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Ujeeddada isticmaalaha: ka caawi inay doortaan su'aalo furitaan oo fiiqan.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Qiimaha = saadaalinta qulqulka lacagta caddaanka ah ee bilaashka ah oo laga jaray khatarta + qiimaha terminalka oo la dhimay.
Nidaamyada xaafaduhu waxay habeeyeen nolosha magaalada
diirran, wax ku ool ah, diiradda saaraya dardargelinta

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Siigada qoyan, xanta la qaylinayo, qiiqa, baaqyada salaadda, iyo welwelka birta ah ee magaalo cadaadis ku jirta.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Maxaan isku dayaynaa inaan dhisno, xallino, baranno, ama horumarino?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Maxaad rabtaa inaad weydiiso, tijaabiso, barato, ama aad wajahdo?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Maxaad rabtaa inaad fahanto ama awood u yeelato inaad samayso?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?

entries.value: Maxaa dood ka dhigaya mid sax ah?

entries.source: What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
entries.value: Waxyaabaha ay qiimeeyaan, difaacaan, tabayaan, ama ay diidaan.

entries.source: What would you like to be quizzed on today?
entries.value: Maxaad jeclaan lahayd in maanta lagaa weydiiyo?
Waxa aad ilaa hadda u malaynayso

entries.source: Where and when do you want to go?
entries.value: Halkee iyo goorma ayaad rabtaa inaad tagto?
Halka aad dareemayso inaad ku xayiran tahay

entries.source: Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Haddii hal kulan uu beddelo jihada dadweynaha

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
entries.value: Cidda cadaadisa, taageerta, ama u hanjabta.
Sababta ay arrintani muhiim u tahay
Dharka safarka ee la isticmaali karo
Hababka aqoon-is-weydaarsigu waa dib-u-dhisyo macquul ah

entries.source: Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Qor cutub ka kooban 4 jumladood oo leh sheegasho, caddayn, sharraxaad, iyo cawaaqib.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Qor jawaab gaaban. App-ku wuxuu hubiyaa xiriirka, ma aha qurxinta.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Qor xiriirka aasaasiga ah hal jumlad ka hor intaadan sii wadin.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Qor jawaabtaada, xitaa haddii ay qallafsan tahay.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Haa. Caddayntu waxay u baahan tahay tafsiir ama dooddu waxay u muuqataa mid aan dhammaystirnayn.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Haa. Waxaad isku xirtay iibka, margin-ka, iyo caasimadda shaqada halkii aad hal sadar ula dhaqmi lahayd sidii qaabka oo dhan.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Waxaad marka hore ku dartaa fikrado si saaxiibku uu kula dhiso.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
entries.value: Waxaad aqoonsan kartaa qeexitaanka marka uu soo baxo.

entries.source: You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Waxaad si sax ah ugu isticmaali kartaa tusaale cusub.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Waxaad bixisay xiriir sababayn oo ku filan si aad hore ugu socoto.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Hadda waxaad haysataa khariidad bilow ah. Aan dib u dhisno meelaha daciifka ah.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Waxaad haysataa caddayn tallaabadan. Isticmaal Sii wad si aad hore ugu socoto.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Waxaad magacawday wax-soo-gelin isbeddelay oo aad ku xirtay natiijada. Taasi waa dhaqdhaqaaqa aan tababareyno.
Waxaad soo saartaa gunaanadka kama dambaysta ah.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
entries.value: Waxaad ka akhrisatay saddex sharraxaad oo ku saabsan.

entries.source: Your answer controls the next question.
Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Jawaabtaadu waxay u baahan tahay xiriir-sababayn oo cad: maxaa isbeddelay, maxay saameysay, iyo sababta.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Saaxiibkaagu wuxuu kaa shaqeeyaa dhinacaaga: waxaad ku darsataa fikrado, app-ku wuu habeeyaa, labadiinuna waad hubisaa horumarka.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Xaaladdaadu waxay xakameysaa luqadda, lacagta, gelitaanka, khatarta, iyo waxa su'aalaha ka dhigaya kuwo dabiici ah.
Sharraxaad cad oo ku saabsan wax kasta oo aad xiisaynayso

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Ma xiisaynaysaa wax kasta? Weydii, sahami, oo si qoto dheer u gal xawaarahaaga. Saaxiibkaagu wuxuu fikradaha ka dhigaa kuwo la taaban karo, xusuus mudan, oo fudud in lagu dhiso. Isku day: "Sharax sida suuqa saamiyada uu dhab ahaantii u shaqeeyo."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Weydii su'aal kasta oo ku baro sharraxaad cad, tusaalooyin, su'aalo daba-gal ah, iyo tababaraha AI ee dulqaadka leh.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Ardayda xiisaha leh, ardayda, waalidiinta, iyo kuwa wax baranaya ee doonaya meel saaxiibtinimo leh oo ay ka bilaabaan.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Halkii aad ka heli lahayd jawaab dheer, inspir waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad doorato aasaas fudud, waddo qoto dheer, ama tusaale wax ku ool ah.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question
entries.value: Ka tag su'aal kale oo faa'iido leh
Si fudud iigu sharax godadka madow (black holes)
I bar sida dulsaarku u shaqeeyo

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Qol lagu hago dood-cilmiyeedka si loo su'aalo nidaamsan

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: U beddel fikrad, dood, dhibaato, qoraal, ama go'aan silsilad su'aalo ah oo diiradda saaraya. Saaxiibkaa wuxuu dhegaysanayaa jawaab kasta, wuxuu qeexayaa malo-awaalka iyo daldaloolada, wuxuuna kugu riixayaa dhanka gunaanadkaaga kama dambaysta ah. Isku day: "Iga caawi fahamka kharashka fursadda."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Ku baro su'aalo diiradda saaraya, tilmaamo, iyo milicsi halkii aad si dadban u akhrin lahayd jawaabaha.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Ardayda doonaya inay ka fikiraan mawduuc, tijaabiyaan malo-awaalka, oo dhistaan faham waara.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Macalinku wuxuu weydiiyaa hal su'aal markiiba, wuxuu sugayaa sababayntaada, wuxuuna soo koobayaa oo kaliya ka dib markaad isku daydo.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model

entries.value: Maxaa dood ka dhigaya mid sax ah?

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ma tahay in shirkaddu gasho suuqan?

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Dhis, dhaliil, oo ku baro qol shaqo oo la wadaago

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Fur meel shaqo oo wadaag ah oo lala yeesho kaaliyaha AI. Samee qabyo-qoraal, is-weydaarsada tafatirka, ka dood meelaha daciifka ah, diiwaan geli go'aamada, oo ku dhammee horumar la taaban karo.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Ku dar tafatirkaaga xiga, go'aanka, su'aasha, ama wareejinta

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Fur meel shaqo oo wadaag ah oo lala yeesho kaaliyaha AI. Samee qabyo-qoraal, is-weydaarsada tafatirka, ka dood meelaha daciifka ah, diiwaan geli go'aamada, oo ku dhammee horumar la taaban karo.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mowduucyada aasaasiga ah ee raba hagitaan wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab oo guud.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyey waxbarid wada-shaqayn leh oo leh dhiirigelin u gaar ah, tusaalooyin, iyo habka waxbarashada.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Dhis, dhaliil, oo ku baro qol shaqo oo wadaag ah

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
Adaptive lessons that make you do
entries.value: Casharro la qabsan kara oo kugu dhiirrigelinaya inaad wax qabato

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Baro adigoo samaynaya, arkaya, isbarbardhigaya, hagaajinaya, iyo caddaynaya aqoontaada. App-ku wuxuu u dhisaa shiraac cashar toos ah yoolkaaga halkii uu waxbaridda u beddeli lahaa sheeko dheer. Isku day: "I bar qaabaynta maaliyadda."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
entries.value: Maxaad jeclaan lahayd inaad maanta barato?

entries.source: Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Baro adigoo samaynaya, isbarbardhigaya, hagaajinaya, iyo caddaynaya aqoontaada adigoo wata macallin AI ah oo yoolkaaga u beddela cashar firfircoon.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Ardayda raba shiraac cashar oo hagid leh oo leh tusaalooyin, hubin, iyo ku-dhaqan firfircoon halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen jawaab sheeko dheer.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Habkani wuxuu kalfadhiga ka dhigaa mid is-dhexgal ah, isagoo u kala guuraya sharraxaadda, tallaabooyinka isku-dayga, hubinta, iyo hagaajinta.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: I caawi inaan barto sahayda iyo baahida
I bar xoogagga shanta ah ee Porter

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: 10 su'aalood oo doorasho badan ah oo ku saabsan mawduuc kasta oo leh dhibco

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Dooro mawduuc kasta oo wajah imtixaan ka kooban 10 su'aalood oo doorasho badan ah. Waxaad ka jawaabaysaa hal su'aal markiiba, waxaad helaysaa jawaab celin degdeg ah, waxaadna ku dhammaynaysaa dhibco iyo dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
entries.value: Waa maxay mawduuca aan kugu imtixaanno?

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Samee imtixaan diiradda saaraya doorasho badan oo ku saabsan mawduuc kasta oo dib u eeg sharraxaadaha ka dib jawaab kasta.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Ardayda raba inay si firfircoon wax u xusuustaan, tababar degdeg ah, iyo dhibco ay horumarin karaan.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Habka imtixaanku wuxuu qariyaa jawaabaha ilaa aad ka jawaabto, ka dibna wuxuu khalad kasta u beddelaa qodob dib-u-eegis.
Dib u eeg meelaha daciifka ah
Baasaboor loo galo adduun taariikhi ah

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Hel baasaboor ku meel gaar ah, nadiifi talada safarka, ka dibna sahamiso bulsho taariikhi ah oo gaar ah iyada oo loo marayo goob, khariidad, wakhti, dad, xeerar, agab, iyo caddayn.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Dhis baasaboor ku meel gaar ah, nadiifi talada safarka, oo sahamiso adduun taariikhi ah iyada oo loo marayo goob, khariidad, wakhti, dad, xeerar, agab, iyo caddayn.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Ardayda taariikhda ee raba bulsho gaar ah, aqoonsi, iyo xeerar halkii ay ka ahaan lahaayeen soo koobid xilli guud.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Safarku wuxuu ku salaysan yahay xaalad iyo caddayn: waxa la og yahay, waxa dib loo dhisay, waxa la qiyaasayo, iyo waxa aqoonsigaagu uu si dhab ah u heli karo.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Gala wada-hadal qof taariikhi ah. Weydii su'aalo, ka dood fikradaha, oo dunida ka maqal aragtida xilligooda, qiyamkooda, iyo xaddidaadahooda.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Qofkee taariikhiga ah ayaad jeclaan lahayd inaad la kulanto?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Weydii su'aalo, ka dood fikradaha, oo baro taariikhda adigoo wada-hadallo dhab ah la yeelanaya dad caan ah oo ka yimid waagii hore.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Ardayda doonaya inay fahmaan dadka, doorashooyinka, iyo fikradaha ku jira macnaha taariikhiga ah.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: App-ku wuxuu kala saaraa wada-hadalka qofka dhexdiisa iyo qoraallada kooban ee ku saabsan diiwaannada iyo hubanti la'aanta.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Magacow qof dhab ah ama mid khayaali ah oo kula dooda mawduuc kasta. AI-gu wuxuu adeegsanayaa qaabkooda dadweyne iyo aragtidooda adduunka isagoo doodda ka dhigaya mid caddaalad ah.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: Yaa aad rabtaa inaad la dooddo, maxaase ku saabsan?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Ku tababaro dood adigoo la doodaya qof caan ah ama mid khayaali ah mawduuc aad dooratay.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Ardayda doonaya inay ku tababartaan dood firfircoon oo leh codad xusuus mudan iyo caqabad caddaalad ah.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Dooddu waxay isticmaashaa qaabka dadweynaha iyo aragtida adduunka iyada oo aan la iska dhigin in la ogyahay aaminsanaanta gaarka ah.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Kala dood siyaasadda cimilada Greta Thunberg

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Dood labada dhinacba oo fiiji fikirkaaga

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Dooro mawduuc kasta oo si toos ah u dood. Dooro dhinac, la kulan caqabad, oo baro sida loo sameeyo dood ka wanaagsan.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Kala dood mawduuc kasta, la kulan caqabad, isbarbar dhig sheegashooyinka, oo baro sida loo sameeyo dood ka xoog badan.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Ardayda, doodayaasha, qorayaasha, iyo barayaasha xiiseeya ee doonaya sababaynta ka xoog badan.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Tababaruhu wuxuu soo bandhigaa hal dood oo xooggan markiiba wuxuuna la socdaa sheegashooyinka muhiimka ah.
Ka jawaab doodaha ka soo horjeeda
